integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to update the calendar event.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Odoo web interface (clicking, typing in the browser) rather than just terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI and update the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal commands (like psql or python scripts) used to modify the calendar.event or calendar.attendee records.

integrity.description: The agent selected the attendees from the application's actual interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Attendees are seen being selected from dropdowns or search results within the Odoo Calendar app, not typed into a separate text editor or mocked interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target event is 'Q2 Financial Review'. The employees with 'Manager' in their job position are Carol Martinez, Emma Thompson, and Isabel Santos. The original attendees that must remain on the invite list are Alice Johnson, Bob Williams, and Henry Kim.
